/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared -Wl,-soname,libmysqlrouter.so.1 -o ../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlrouter.so.1 CMakeFiles/router_lib.dir/auto_cleaner.cc.o CMakeFiles/router_lib.dir/common/utils_sqlstring.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/tmp/mysql/cmake-build-mysql-docker/library_output_directory::::::::::::::::: -ldl
